The '''Shelba 730 Razor''' was a [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] that saw use during [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. [[Bozzie Baranta]] bought one,<ref name="E1R" /> but ended up putting more money into repairing it as he did actually buying it. It lacked a high top speed compared to other podracers, though this suited the [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] course on [[Ord Ibanna]], which Bozzie frequented.<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> Its also considered one of the most flashy, elegant and beautiful pod ships among the racers of the tournaments due to its royal-blue, [[silver]] and [[gold]] colors.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Shelba 730 Razor was originally created for use in the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], but was ultimately cut before the film's animatic stages.<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}} [[Star Wars home video releases|DVD special features]]</ref> The Shelba was recycled for use in the tie-in [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|Star Wars Episode I: Racer]]'', which was released during the same year as the film.<ref name="IGN">{{WebCite|url=https://www.ign.com/games/star-wars-episode-i-racer|text=Star Wars: Episode I: Racer - Nintendo 64 - IGN|work=[http://www.ign.com IGN]|archivedate=20200524203904}}</ref>
